message:
feat(tldr): add 3D perspective tilt effect to tool cards on hover

Enhances tool card interactivity with a subtle 3D tilt effect that
tracks the cursor position:

- Calculate tilt angles (max ±4 degrees) relative to card center using
  CSS custom properties (--tilt-x, --tilt-y) updated on mousemove
- Apply perspective(800px) rotateX/rotateY transform with 0.15s ease-out
  transition for smooth, responsive feel
- Reset tilt to 0 on mouse leave to prevent stuck transforms
- Effect is purely visual polish — no layout or accessibility impact

Also syncs beads issue tracker state.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
